info.title: Vehicle Service API
info.description: API for accessing vehicle information, articles, maintenance schedules, parts, and related content

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Operations for retrieving articles, graphics, and asset content

tags.description: Operations for vehicle information and selection

get.description: Returns proxy health status including whether the upstream Motor session is valid

lastAuth.description: Epoch ms of last successful auth

get.description: Returns the current authentication status and progress. Use this endpoint to poll for authentication progress when a 401 response indicates authentication is in progress.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when authentication started (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

completedAt.description: Timestamp when authentication completed (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

sessionValid.description: Whether the current session is valid

lastAuth.description: Timestamp of last successful authentication (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

post.description: Manually trigger authentication. Authentication also starts automatically when a 401 response is received. Use this endpoint to pre-authenticate or retry failed authentication.

get.description: Returns buffered proxy request/response logs with optional filtering
Returns aggregate statistics from the log buffer

post.description: Clears all entries from the in-memory log buffer

get.description: Fetches available vehicle configurations/orientations for articles that require selection (e.g. engine variants)

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: The article ID (e.g. -999 for orientation selection)

get.description: Content and relevant metadata for a specific article in the context of a vehicle
Content and relevant metadata for a specific labor operation in the context of a vehicle from MCDB
The raw XML content of an article. Included for debugging purposes.
The title of the referenced article. For GM publication objects the article ID must include the publication_object_syskey to uniquely identify the title.
Returns the image for the provided ID. Returns a 404 with a static svg declaring that the image is not available if the image cannot be found.
Prior route for retrieving images. Do not remove, this route is referenced in saved bookmarks.
Returns an asset for the provided ID

get.summary: Get search results by vehicle ID
get.description: Metadata for articles that match the provided vehicle and search term
Get maintenance schedules grouped by frequency.

Gets a summary of indicators at which maintenance schedules occur for given VehicleId
Get available years

All vehicles matching the provided year and make

All motor vehicles matching the provided year and make

Get diagrams for the vehicle. HTML content in the response is normalized by the proxy.

Returns the current credit balance and unlocked modules for the user

parameters.name: x-user-id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the user

Unlocks a specific vehicle feature for a user by deducting credits

ArticleResponse.description: Article response containing article content and metadata

ModelAndVehicleIdListResponse.description: Model and vehicle ID list response

ArticleContent.description: Article content containing HTML. The proxy normalizes this content.

html.description: The HTML content of the article. **Consumption Logic:** 1. **URL Rewriting:** All relative URLs (src, href) and absolute paths starting with `/` are rewritten to point to the proxy base URL. 2. **Custom Tags:** - `Text` is converted to `Text`. - `` is converted to ``. 3. **PDF Handling:** Base64 encoded PDFs in the response are converted to iframe embeds.
